title: Recurring Bookings - Implementation Plan
overview: Add recurring booking capability (weekly/biweekly) for 30/60/90 days, cancellable at any time (removing only future instances). Update UI (calendar view), Supabase schema, Edge Functions, and notifications.
assumptions: Guests cannot create recurring bookings; feature is available only from the Profile page for authenticated users.
Recurring instances must obey existing availability and double-booking constraints.
Use local-time behavior consistently (per current app).
Instances are pre-created up-front for the selected horizon (30/60/90) on enable; conflicting dates are handled interactively in the UI and skipped on creation.
On cancellation, only a single notification is sent (not per instance).

answers.q1: Pre-create all instances up-front within the chosen period.
answers.q2: Check for conflicts first; if any, prompt the user. If user proceeds, create only available instances and mark skipped ones with status=false for the instance record.
answers.q4: Profile calendar replaces the current 3-section tables entirely.
answers.q5: Only one notification is sent on cancellation (user email if registered, admin SMS).

questions.text: Should we persist a plan-level row (metadata) separate from instance rows, or keep a single 'recurring_bookings' table where each row is an instance (with date + status)?
questions.suggested: Single 'recurring_bookings' table per your spec plus added fields (date, status).

tasks.title: Database Schema Updates
tasks.description: Add recurring support to bookings and create instance records for recurrence.
acceptanceCriteria: bookings table has boolean 'recurring' default false

recurring_bookings table exists with: id (uuid, pk), booking_id (uuid fk to bookings.id on delete cascade), recurrence_type (text: 'weekly'|'biweekly'), until (date), day (text), hour (time), date (date for this instance), status (bool, default true), created_at, updated_at
steps: Create migration to add bookings.recurring boolean default false
Create migration for recurring_bookings as specified (FK to bookings.id, on delete cascade)
Ensure uuid extension enabled and defaults set
Regenerate Supabase types in src/integrations/supabase/types.ts (via Supabase CLI)

tasks.title: Edge Function: create_recurring_bookings
tasks.description: Generate recurring instances when user enables recurrence on a booking; pre-create instances up-front with conflict review.
acceptanceCriteria: POST with payload { bookingId, recurrenceType: 'weekly'|'biweekly', horizonDays: 30|60|90 }
Checks conflicts (booked/blocked) before creation; returns a preview of dates and which are unavailable
If client confirms, creates booking rows only for available dates and recurring_bookings instance rows for all selected dates (status=false for skipped conflicts)
Sets original bookings.recurring = true
Returns arrays: createdInstances, skippedInstances
steps: Load original booking and compute candidate dates based on weekly/biweekly until horizon
For each date: check availability + double-booking; build preview result
On confirm: insert bookings for available dates; insert recurring_bookings rows for each date (date, status=true/false)
Update original booking.recurring = true
Return result payload

tasks.title: Edge Function: cancel_recurring_bookings
tasks.description: Cancel recurrence: delete only future booking instances and update metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: POST with { bookingId } (or instance linkage)
Deletes bookings with same service/day/hour strictly in the future that belong to this recurrence
Sets original booking.recurring = false
Returns count of deleted instances
steps: Identify the set of future instances from recurring_bookings and matching bookings
Delete bookings that are in the future (>= tomorrow)
Update bookings.recurring = false and (optionally) mark related recurring_bookings rows
Return summary

tasks.title: Notifications: templates and service hooks
tasks.description: Add notifications for enabling/cancelling recurrence (guests excluded).
acceptanceCriteria: On enable: user email (if registered) and admin SMS include day/hour and horizon
On cancel: single confirmation to user (email) and admin (SMS)
Guests cannot trigger recurrence
steps: Add email templates to emailService for 'recurring_enabled' and 'recurring_cancelled'
Add SMS templates to smsService for admin notifications
Add hook methods in useBookingNotifications: sendRecurringEnabled, sendRecurringCancelled
Integrate calls in UI actions post-successful Edge Function response
Ensure UI hides the action for isGuest

tasks.title: Frontend: Profile Calendar View
tasks.description: Replace user bookings list with calendar + day detail view with color-coding and recurring indicators.
acceptanceCriteria: Calendar shows month grid with today highlighted (blue)
Past days grey, future days white
Day colors/dots: past booking (dark purple), future booking (bright violet), recurring booking (light green)
Below calendar: list for selected day with edit/delete; default to today
Works responsively
steps: Introduce calendar component (reuse booking calendar styles)
Replace ProfilePage tables with calendar + detail list
Aggregate bookings by date; include 'recurring' flag for color-coding
Maintain existing edit/delete modals

tasks.title: UI: Make Recurring flow
tasks.description: Make Recurring button + mini-form (weekly/biweekly, 30/60/90) with conflict prompt.
acceptanceCriteria: Button visible only for authenticated users
Form shows preview and warns when conflicts detected: 'some dates are taken, proceed anyway?'
On confirm, calls create_recurring_bookings; shows success and any skipped dates
Calendar reflects created instances
steps: Add button and modal/form UI in ProfilePage booking detail
Call Edge Function to preview; if conflicts, show prompt
On confirm, call creation; refresh calendar state and show toast per outcome

tasks.title: UI: Cancel Recurring flow
tasks.description: Provide 'Cancel Recurring' to delete remaining future occurrences.
acceptanceCriteria: Action calls cancel_recurring_bookings
Removes only future instances; original remains
Sends single cancellation notification
steps: Detect recurring flag and show action
Wire to Edge Function; update UI and badges
Show result summary (# deleted)

tasks.title: Admin: Minimal recurring visibility
tasks.description: Indicate recurring bookings in Admin/Bookings list and allow quick filter.
acceptanceCriteria: Recurring bookings have a visual indicator in the list
Optional filter: show only recurring
steps: Include 'recurring' in select and render a badge
Add filter dropdown option

tasks.title: Double-booking and availability alignment
tasks.description: Ensure recurrence respects existing checks (utils + contexts).
acceptanceCriteria: No recurring instance is created if slot is booked or blocked
Function returns a list of skipped instances with reasons
steps: Reuse checkForDoubleBooking and availability lookups inside Edge Function
Unit test representative samples

tasks.title: Testing & QA
tasks.description: Comprehensive tests for recurrence creation/cancellation, notifications, and UI calendar.
acceptanceCriteria: Happy paths (weekly/biweekly; 30/60/90)
Guest cannot access recurring actions
Conflict handling (skipped instances)
Cancel removes only future instances
Calendar renders correctly across months
steps: Manual and automated tests where possible
Staging dataset with edge cases (DST, month boundaries)

risks: Time zone and DST causing off-by-one hour dates
Two-table vs one-table design for recurrence; we proceed with single-table instance model per answers.
nextActions: Proceed with Edge Functions (Tasks 2 & 3) and notification templates (Task 4)
